nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy. Low around 54, with temperatures rising to around 58 overnight. South southeast wind around 8 mph.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 3pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 76, with temperatures falling to around 74 in the afternoon. Southeast wind 6 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before midnight. Mostly cloudy. Low around 54, with temperatures rising to around 58 overnight. South southeast wind 8 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Friday
nws.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 3pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 83. East southeast wind 3 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 16 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 52. South southwest wind 5 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
